minutes_briefs.title: Burnaby Bylaw 14829 changes rules for works and services on your property
minutes_briefs.summary: Burnaby has passed a new bylaw (a local law) called the Works and Services Bylaw 2026. This bylaw updates the rules for building or repairing things like water pipes, sewer lines, roads, and sidewalks on private property. It sets new standards for how these projects must be designed, built, and inspected. If you own a business in Burnaby and plan to do any construction or development work that connects to city services, you must follow these new rules.
minutes_briefs.action_required: Review the new Works and Services Bylaw 2026 with your contractor or engineer before starting any new construction or development project in Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Works and Services Bylaw 2026 takes effect

minutes_briefs.source_body: Burnaby Bylaw 14829: Works and Services Bylaw 2026
